apps.name: aria
apps.subtitle: 地球で生まれた分散型SNSに飛び込もう
apps.localizedDescription:
地球で生まれた分散型SNSに飛び込もう

Ariaは分散型マイクロブログプラットフォームMisskeyのクライアントアプリです。

Misskeyのほとんどの機能を利用可能
各種タイムラインの閲覧や投稿、クリップやリストなどの編集をはじめとしたMisskeyの提供する機能の大部分に対応しています。

複数のアカウントやサーバーをスワイプして切り替え
Ariaでは見たいタイムラインをタブとして保存することで簡単に好きなタイムラインを見ることができます。どのアカウントのタイムラインでもタブに追加できるので、サーバーを横断して話題を追いかけることが簡単にできます。

公式のMisskey Webクライアントに近いUI
ブラウザから見られる公式フロントエンドに近い、馴染みやすいデザインを実現しています。MFMによるノートの装飾にも対応しています。

高度にカスタマイズ可能
リアクションの表示サイズやユーザーアイコンの表示など多数の設定を変更して自分の好みに調整することができます。テーマを変更して好きな色にアプリをデコレーションすることもできます。

privacy.NSCameraUsageDescription: To take photos or videos, please allow access to your camera.
privacy.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: To record audio files, please allow access to your microphone.
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: To download files, please allow access to your photo library.
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: To upload files, please allow access to your photo library.

apps.name: Nextcloud
apps.subtitle: Private cloud storage
apps.localizedDescription:
Regain control over your data.

The Nextcloud app for iOS brings your photos and files with you wherever you go!

- Connect one or multiple accounts to your private or business cloud.
- Access, work on and share documents wherever you are.
- Upload your photos and videos to your Nextcloud to save space on your phone.
- Browse photos and videos stored on your private cloud.
- Choose files to keep available even when you're offline.
- Additional features:
  - Nextcloud AI Assistant
  - Drag and drop between multiple Nextcloud Files windows on your iPad
  - Protect your account with a password or FaceID
  - Support for End to end encryption.

New to Nextcloud? Nextcloud is a collaboration platform designed for private clouds. Host it yourself or with a company you trust and you gain a complete digital workplace with online office document collaboration, video calls and chat, email, calendar and project management, a local AI assistant and much more.

See https://nextcloud.com/hub to find out what Nextcloud can do for you!

For discussions and reporting issues please go to https://help.nextcloud.com/c/clients/ios

privacy.NSCameraUsageDescription: Camera access is required to scan documents and take photos in this app.
privacy.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Face ID is required to authenticate using face recognition.
privacy.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: This app needs access to your location even in the background to automatically start uploading files when significant movement is detected. GPS is not used.
privacy.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: The app uses your location to automatically trigger file uploads when you move between areas.
privacy.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This app uses your location to detect movement and automatically upload files. It does not use GPS and does not store your location.
privacy.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Microphone access is required to create voice notes.
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: This lets you upload and save photos using this app. Photos can then be browsed and viewed via the Media tab.
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This lets you upload and save photos using this app. Photos can then be browsed and viewed via the Media tab.
